description: Composition Black briefs made of 100% combed cotton, ribbed fabric, has a durable signature logo waistband made of spandex, double layered front with reinforced seams and printed label on the inner Fit Low rise Wash care Machine wash warm at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry cleanable These low-rise contour briefs from crusoe are crafted using pure cotton that lets the fabric contour your hips and allows you to stretch in ease. The double layered front and the reinforced seams provide durability, while the printed label on the inside provides abrasion-free comfort. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model with waist 34" and hips 38"
